page_metadata.biotools__summary: Polypeptide Angles Suffix Tree (PAST) provides methods for searching three-dimensional protein structures and identifying frequent common substructures (structural motifs) using an approach independent of the sequence of amino acids.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Polypeptide Angles Suffix Tree (PAST) provides methods for searching three-dimensional protein structures and identifying frequent common substructures (structural motifs) using an approach independent of the sequence of amino acids.
